name: @shamu/adapter-amp
description: Amp AgentAdapter for Shamu. Stream-JSON-shell variation of the Claude/Codex family (Phase 7.D). Long-lived `amp -x --stream-json --stream-json-input` subprocess: stdin stays open between turns (matches Claude/Codex shape and simplifies interrupt()). No runtime dependency on @sourcegraph/amp — binary ships via `npm install -g @sourcegraph/amp` and is resolved from vendorCliPath / AMP_CLI_PATH / Bun.which('amp') at spawn time. Resume via `amp threads continue <thread-id>`. Auth via AMP_API_KEY env (non-interactive) or pre-ran `amp login` (keychain-backed).
